title: Accounts
subtitle: Your institutions and their per-currency account balances.

list.title: Your institutions
list.empty: No institutions yet. Add your first institution to track its accounts and your net worth.
list.noAccounts: No accounts yet. Add one below.

wizard.title: Add institution

step2.label: Accounts
step2.heading: Add its accounts
step2.subheading: Optional — add an ARS and/or USD account now, or skip and add them later.
step2.empty: No accounts yet. Add one below, or skip to create the institution on its own.
step2.rowFailed: Couldn't create this account. Retry below.

wizard.institutionError: We couldn't create the institution. Check your connection and try again.
wizard.partialFailure: The institution was created, but some accounts didn't. Fix them and retry — the institution is kept.

success.title: {{name}} is ready
success.noAccounts: Created with no accounts yet. Add them anytime from the list.

institutionForm.saveError: We couldn't save this institution. Check your connection and try again.

currency.label: Currency
currency.lockedHelper: Currency can't be changed after an account is created.

openingBalance.label: Opening balance
openingBalance.helper: The balance when you start tracking this account.

form.saveError: We couldn't save this account. Check your connection and try again.

error.title: Can't load your accounts
error.description: We couldn't reach the server to load your accounts. Check your connection and try again.

netWorth.title: Net worth
netWorth.subtitle: Total across your accounts
netWorth.empty: Add an account to see your net worth here.
netWorth.degradeNote: Totalled in each account's own currency — add a USD transaction with a rate to convert.
netWorth.errorDescription: We couldn't load your net worth right now. Try again.
